title: David Charles Warren
content:
{{Filmmaker |image = David Charles Warren.jpg |movie = ''[[Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 3]]'' |tv series = ''[[The Falcon and The Winter Soldier]]'' (6 episodes)
''[[Loki (TV series)|Loki]]'' (1 episode)
''[[Hawkeye (TV series)|Hawkeye]]'' (1 episode)}} '''David Charles Warren III''' was a stunt performer in the ''[[The Falcon and The Winter Soldier]]'' episodes ''[[New World Order]]'', ''[[Power Broker (episode)|Power Broker]]'', ''[[Truth]]'' and ''[[One World, One People]]'', the ''[[Hawkeye (TV series)|Hawkeye]]'' episode ''[[Never Meet Your Heroes]]'' and ''[[Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 3]]''. He was also a stunt double for [[Clé Bennett]] in the ''[[The Falcon and The Winter Soldier]]'' episodes ''[[The Star-Spangled Man]]'' and ''[[The Whole World Is Watching]]'', [[Jonathan Majors]] in the ''[[Loki (TV series)|Loki]]'' episode ''[[For All Time. Always.]]''. ==Trivia== *David Charles Warren was also a stunt double for [[Anthony Mackie]] in ''{{WPS|Twisted Metal (TV series)|Twisted Metal}}''. *David Charles Warren was a stunt performer in the {{WPS|DC Extended Universe}} production ''{{WPS|Black Adam (film)|Black Adam}}''. *David Charles Warren was a stunt performer in the {{WPS|DC Entertainment}} productions ''{{WPS|Black Lightning (TV series)|Black Lightning}}'' and ''{{WPS|Gotham Knights (TV series)|Gotham Knights}}''. ==External Links== *{{IMDb|7993442}} *{{Instagram|david.charles.warren.iii}} *{{Facebook|100010494702820}} *{{YouTube|channel/UCRLrsxEIPC2CGehAWbuF38A/videos}} *{{Vimeo|user89013981}} [[Category:Crew]] [[Category:Stunt Performers]] [[Category:Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 3 Crew Members]] [[Category:The Falcon and The Winter Soldier Crew Members]] [[Category:Loki (TV series) Crew Members]] [[Category:Hawkeye (TV series) Crew Members]] [[Category:Crew Members with Roles in Comic Book Adaptations outside the Marvel Cinematic Universe]]
